rows.label: xs12010150_MSG0001
rows.name:
As Director General Maurice
said, time is of the essence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010150_MSG0003
rows.name:
The mission is to secure the Central Life
and switch it to the backup system.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010150_MSG0004
rows.name:
The location is still being analyzed, but it will be done
within two hours. Sortie as soon as it's confirmed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12010150_MSG0005
rows.name:
I want every BLADE participating. It will be
a harsh mission, but I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]
